prompt: quick dump, three things so I dont forget: 1) we keep forgetting to bump the plugin version before a release, 2) the dashboard needs a dark-mode toggle, 3) clicking a card should let me copy its task id to the clipboard. dont ask me questions, just file them

assertions.text: Exactly three new task .md files are created (split, not bundled)
All three tasks are in backlog/; none in todo/
Plugin-version-bump idea routed to the infrastructure BC
Dark-mode and copy-id routed to a UI-bearing BC (agentic-workflow or design-system), not infrastructure
Each created task has valid frontmatter (status backlog, matching context, id pattern)
Each affected BC INDEX backlog-list and count updated
protocol.md has a Capture entry for EACH of the three tasks
The agent asked the user NO clarifying questions
Protocol entries use the standard spec header format
